metadata.title: Everything I Own (Extended P W Botha Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:15.71] You sheltered me from harm
[00:19.88] Kept me warm, kept me warm
[00:27.12] You gave my life to me
[00:30.79] Set me free, you set me free
[00:37.43] Of all the years I ever knew
[00:42.92] Those finer one's I spent with you
[00:46.77] I would give everything I own
[00:52.29] Give up my life, my heart, my home
[00:57.80] I would give everything I own
[01:03.91] Just to have you back again
[01:15.21] 
[01:19.52] You taught me how to cry
[01:22.92] I don't know why, just don't know why
[01:30.60] You told those lies to me
[01:34.29] You set me free, you set me free
[01:41.06] Of all the years, I ever knew
[01:46.46] Those finer ones, I spent with you
[01:50.34] I would give everything I own
[01:55.81] Give up my life, my heart, my home
[02:01.47] I would give everything I own
[02:07.51] Just to have you back again
[02:13.02] Just to hold you once again
[02:18.54] If there's someone you know that won't let you go
[02:24.34] And taking it all for granted
[02:29.41] You may lose them one day
[02:32.25] Someone take them away
[02:35.08] And you don't hear a word they say
[02:39.63] I would give everything I own
[02:45.06] Give up my life, my heart, my home
[02:50.55] I would give everything I own
[02:56.69] Just to have you back again
[03:02.12] Just to hold you once again
[03:07.06] I would give everything I own
[03:14.47] Give up my life, my heart, my home
[03:15.55] I would give everything I own
[03:32.79] 
[03:34.96] Just to have you back again
[03:40.20] Just to hold you once again, once again
[04:18.63]
